creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
For one of the one hundred and forty-two: 

grahamperrin:~ % rg --count --sort path sysutils\/openzfs /usr/doc
/usr/doc/documentation/content/en/books/handbook/zfs/_index.adoc:1
/usr/doc/documentation/content/en/books/handbook/zfs/_index.po:1
grahamperrin:~ % 

So, for example, <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/zfs/#zfs-zfs-compression-zstd> leads to <https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/sysutils/openzfs/> with a red alert: 

> Path not found

– and we must not assume that a newcomer to the FreeBSD Handbook will be familiar with website navigation in cgit, and so on …
